# Android Plugin Test Requirements

> Test requirements for the Android plugin implementation

**Status**: DRAFT  
**Type**: TDD (Test-Driven Development)  
**Generated by**: /legacy analysis  
**Date**: 2026-03-04

---

## Overview

This document specifies the test requirements for the Android plugin layer of the Flutter Dialer plugin. Tests ensure correctness of TelecomManager integration, error handling, and version compatibility.

---

## Test Categories

### Unit Tests (JUnit + MockK)

**Purpose**: Test plugin logic in isolation

**Dependencies**:
- JUnit 4
- MockK (Kotlin mocking library)
- AndroidX Test Core (for Context mocking)

**Location**: `android/src/test/kotlin/org/tele/flutter_dialer/`

---

### Integration Tests

**Purpose**: Test plugin with real Android system services

**Requirements**:
- Android emulator or device (API 23+)
- Flutter integration test framework
- Permissions granted

**Location**: `android/src/androidTest/` or `integration_test/`

---

## Unit Test Specifications

### Test Class: FlutterDialerPluginTest

**Existing File**: `android/src/test/kotlin/org/tele/flutter_dialer/FlutterDialerPluginTest.kt`

### Lifecycle Tests

#### Test: onAttachedToEngine_initializesChannel

**Purpose**: Verify channel is created correctly during attachment

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val plugin = FlutterDialerPlugin()
val mockBinding = mockk<FlutterPlugin.FlutterPluginBinding>()
val mockMessenger = mockk<BinaryMessenger>()
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()

every { mockBinding.binaryMessenger } returns mockMessenger
every { mockBinding.applicationContext } returns mockContext
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onAttachedToEngine(mockBinding)
```

**Assertions**:
- MethodChannel was created with correct name ("flutter_dialer")
- MethodCallHandler was set to the plugin instance

---

#### Test: onDetachedFromEngine_clearsHandler

**Purpose**: Verify handler is cleared during detachment

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val plugin = FlutterDialerPlugin()
val mockBinding = mockk<FlutterPlugin.FlutterPluginBinding>()
every { mockBinding.binaryMessenger } returns mockk()

plugin.onAttachedToEngine(mockBinding)
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onDetachedFromEngine(mockBinding)
```

**Assertions**:
- `channel.setMethodCallHandler(null)` was called

---

### Method Routing Tests

#### Test: onMethodCall_routesIsDefaultDialer

**Purpose**: Verify isDefaultDialer method is routed correctly

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val plugin = FlutterDialerPlugin()
val mockCall = mockk<MethodCall>()
val mockResult = mockk<Result>()

every { mockCall.method } returns "isDefaultDialer"
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onMethodCall(mockCall, mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `isDefaultDialer` logic was invoked
- `mockResult.success()` was called with boolean value

---

#### Test: onMethodCall_routesSetDefaultDialer

**Purpose**: Verify setDefaultDialer method is routed correctly

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockCall = mockk<MethodCall>()
every { mockCall.method } returns "setDefaultDialer"
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onMethodCall(mockCall, mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `setDefaultDialer` logic was invoked
- `mockResult.success(true)` was called

---

#### Test: onMethodCall_routesCanSetDefaultDialer

**Purpose**: Verify canSetDefaultDialer method is routed correctly

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockCall = mockk<MethodCall>()
every { mockCall.method } returns "canSetDefaultDialer"
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onMethodCall(mockCall, mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `canSetDefaultDialer` logic was invoked
- `mockResult.success()` was called with boolean value

---

#### Test: onMethodCall_unknownMethod_returnsNotImplemented

**Purpose**: Verify unknown methods return notImplemented

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockCall = mockk<MethodCall>()
every { mockCall.method } returns "unknownMethod"
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.onMethodCall(mockCall, mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.notImplemented()` was called

---

### Version Handling Tests

#### Test: isDefaultDialer_apiLessThan23_returnsTrue

**Purpose**: Verify graceful handling of pre-API-23 devices

**Setup**:
```kotlin
// Use Robolectric or mock Build.VERSION
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()
// Mock to simulate API < 23
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.isDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(true)` was called
- No TelecomManager access attempted

---

#### Test: canSetDefaultDialer_apiLessThan23_returnsFalse

**Purpose**: Verify graceful handling of pre-API-23 devices

**Setup**:
```kotlin
// Mock to simulate API < 23
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.canSetDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(false)` was called
- No TelecomManager access attempted

---

### Error Handling Tests

#### Test: isDefaultDialer_exception_returnsError

**Purpose**: Verify exceptions are caught and returned as errors

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockTelecomManager = mockk<TelecomManager>()
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()

every { mockContext.getSystemService(Context.TELECOM_SERVICE) }
    .throws(Exception("Test exception"))
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.isDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.error()` was called
- Error code is "IS_DEFAULT_DIALER_ERROR"
- Error message is not empty

---

#### Test: setDefaultDialer_exception_returnsError

**Purpose**: Verify exceptions are caught and returned as errors

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()
every { mockContext.startActivity(any()) }
    .throws(SecurityException("Missing permission"))
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.setDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.error()` was called
- Error code is "SET_DEFAULT_DIALER_ERROR"

---

#### Test: canSetDefaultDialer_exception_returnsError

**Purpose**: Verify exceptions are caught and returned as errors

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()
every { mockContext.getSystemService(Context.TELECOM_SERVICE) }
    .throws(ClassCastException("Invalid cast"))
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.canSetDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.error()` was called
- Error code is "CAN_SET_DEFAULT_DIALER_ERROR"

---

### Business Logic Tests

#### Test: isDefaultDialer_samePackage_returnsTrue

**Purpose**: Verify correct detection when app IS default dialer

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockTelecomManager = mockk<TelecomManager>()
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()
val packageName = "org.tele.flutter_dialer"

every { mockContext.packageName } returns packageName
every { mockTelecomManager.defaultDialerPackage } returns packageName
every { mockContext.getSystemService(Context.TELECOM_SERVICE) } returns mockTelecomManager
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.isDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(true)` was called

---

#### Test: isDefaultDialer_differentPackage_returnsFalse

**Purpose**: Verify correct detection when app is NOT default dialer

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockTelecomManager = mockk<TelecomManager>()
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()

every { mockContext.packageName } returns "org.tele.flutter_dialer"
every { mockTelecomManager.defaultDialerPackage } returns "com.other.dialer"
every { mockContext.getSystemService(Context.TELECOM_SERVICE) } returns mockTelecomManager
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.isDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(false)` was called

---

#### Test: canSetDefaultDialer_alreadyDefault_returnsFalse

**Purpose**: Verify returns false when already default

**Setup**:
```kotlin
// Same package for both
every { mockContext.packageName } returns packageName
every { mockTelecomManager.defaultDialerPackage } returns packageName
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.canSetDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(false)` was called

---

#### Test: canSetDefaultDialer_notDefault_returnsTrue

**Purpose**: Verify returns true when not already default

**Setup**:
```kotlin
// Different packages
every { mockContext.packageName } returns "org.tele.flutter_dialer"
every { mockTelecomManager.defaultDialerPackage } returns "com.other.dialer"
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.canSetDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockResult.success(true)` was called

---

#### Test: setDefaultDialer_startsActivity

**Purpose**: Verify system dialog intent is started

**Setup**:
```kotlin
val mockContext = mockk<Context>()
every { mockContext.packageName } returns "org.tele.flutter_dialer"
every { mockContext.startActivity(any()) } just Runs
```

**Execution**:
```kotlin
plugin.setDefaultDialer(mockResult)
```

**Assertions**:
- `mockContext.startActivity()` was called
- Intent action is `ACTION_CHANGE_DEFAULT_DIALER`
- Intent has correct extra (package name)
- Intent has flag `FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK`
- `mockResult.success(true)` was called

---

## Integration Test Specifications

### Requirements

**Device/Emulator**:
- Android API 23+
- TelecomManager service available
- Phone simulation capability

**Permissions** (in test manifest):
```xml
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CALL_PHONE" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE" />
```

### Integration Tests

#### Test: isDefaultDialer_returnsCorrectStatus

**Purpose**: Verify actual TelecomManager integration

**Steps**:
1. Get current default dialer status
2. Call `isDefaultDialer()`
3. Verify result matches actual status

---

#### Test: canSetDefaultDialer_returnsCorrectStatus

**Purpose**: Verify can-set logic

**Steps**:
1. Get current default dialer package
2. Call `canSetDefaultDialer()`
3. Verify result is inverse of "is default"

---

#### Test: setDefaultDialer_opensSystemDialog

**Purpose**: Verify system dialog is opened

**Note**: Cannot automate user interaction, but can verify:
- Intent was sent
- Activity was started
- Returns true immediately

---

## Test Coverage Requirements

| Component | Minimum Coverage |
|-----------|------------------|
| Lifecycle methods | 100% |
| Method routing | 100% |
| Version handling | 100% |
| Error handling | 100% |
| Business logic | 90% |

**Overall Target**: >90% line coverage

---

## Test Execution

### Run Unit Tests

```bash
cd android
./gradlew test
```

### Run Integration Tests

```bash
flutter test integration_test/
# OR
cd android
./gradlew connectedAndroidTest
```

---

## Continuous Integration

**GitHub Actions** (or similar):
- Run unit tests on every PR
- Run integration tests on merge to main
- Report code coverage

---

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Setup test dependencies (MockK, JUnit)
- [ ] Create FlutterDialerPluginTest.kt
- [ ] Implement lifecycle tests
- [ ] Implement method routing tests
- [ ] Implement version handling tests
- [ ] Implement error handling tests
- [ ] Implement business logic tests
- [ ] Setup integration test framework
- [ ] Implement integration tests
- [ ] Configure CI pipeline
- [ ] Achieve >90% code coverage
